openparser/feed

    • AtomEntry
    • AtomFeed

        fetchAtom
      • fetchAtom(url: string): AtomFeed
        parseAtom
      • parseAtom(xml: string): AtomFeed
        readAtom
      • readAtom(filePath: string): AtomFeed
        toAtomXml
      • toAtomXml(feed: AtomFeed): string

This module provides functionality to parse and generate Atom feeds in Nim. It defines data structures to represent Atom feeds, entries, authors, links, categories, and content, as well as functions to read Atom feeds from files or URLs, parse them from XML strings, and convert them back to XML format.

The module also includes error handling for parsing and validation errors.

Types

AtomCategory = object
  term*: string
  scheme*: Option[string]
  label*: Option[string]
Represents a category construct in Atom, which can be used to categorize feeds or entries. 
AtomContent = object
  kind*: Option[string]
  src*: Option[string]
  value*: Option[string]
Represents the content construct in Atom, which can be used to include the main content of an entry. 
AtomEntry = object
  id*: string
  title*: AtomText
  updated*: string
  authors*: seq[AtomPerson]
  contributors*: seq[AtomPerson]
  links*: seq[AtomLink]
  categories*: seq[AtomCategory]
  summary*: Option[AtomText]
  content*: Option[AtomContent]
  rights*: Option[AtomText]
  published*: Option[string]
Represents an individual entry in an Atom feed, containing metadata and content about the entry. 
AtomFeed = object
  id*: string
  title*: AtomText
  updated*: string
  authors*: seq[AtomPerson]
  contributors*: seq[AtomPerson]
  links*: seq[AtomLink]
  categories*: seq[AtomCategory]
  subtitle*: Option[AtomText]
  rights*: Option[AtomText]
  generator*: Option[AtomGenerator]
  icon*: Option[string]
  logo*: Option[string]
  entries*: seq[AtomEntry]
  lang*: Option[string]
  base*: Option[string]
Represents an Atom feed, containing metadata about the feed and a sequence of entries. 
AtomGenerator = object
  value*: string
  uri*: Option[string]
  version*: Option[string]
Represents the generator construct in Atom, which identifies the software used to generate the feed. 
AtomLink = object
  href*: string
  rel*: Option[string]
  mimeType*: Option[string]
  hreflang*: Option[string]
  title*: Option[string]
  length*: Option[int]
Represents a link construct in Atom, which can be associated with feeds or entries. 
AtomParsingError = object of CatchableError
AtomPerson = object
  name*: string
  uri*: Option[string]
  email*: Option[string]
Represents a person construct in Atom, which can be an author or contributor. 
AtomText = object
  kind*: string
  value*: string
Atom text construct: text|html|xhtml (stored as string payload) 
AtomValidationError = object of CatchableError

Consts

AtomNs = "http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom"

Procs

proc fetchAtom(url: string): AtomFeed {....raises: [IOError, OSError, ValueError,
    Exception, XmlError, AtomParsingError, AtomValidationError,
    HttpRequestError, LibraryError, SslError, TimeoutError, ProtocolError,
    KeyError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
                                        forbids: [].}
Fetches an Atom feed from the specified URL and parses it into an AtomFeed object. 
proc parseAtom(xml: string): AtomFeed {....raises: [IOError, OSError, ValueError,
    Exception, XmlError, AtomParsingError, AtomValidationError], tags: [
    ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Parses an Atom feed from the given XML string and returns an AtomFeed object. 
proc readAtom(filePath: string): AtomFeed {....raises: [IOError, OSError,
    ValueError, Exception, XmlError, AtomParsingError, AtomValidationError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Reads an Atom feed from the specified file path and parses it into an AtomFeed object. 
proc toAtomXml(feed: AtomFeed): string {....raises: [AtomValidationError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts an AtomFeed object back to XML string
